name: Par 3 Eagles Indoor Golf
address: 1401 S Waldron Rd Suite 104, Fort Smith, AR 72903
about: Par 3 Eagles Indoor Golf is an indoor golf facility in Fort Smith, AR, powered by OptiShot RSG Pro technology. It provides a realistic, high-tech golf experience for players of all levels, accessible year-round regardless of weather conditions. The venue offers complimentary golf clubs, snacks, and water, with premium overhead simulator systems delivering advanced tracking, real-time shot data, and precision analytics to help golfers refine their game. Membership plans are available for varying levels of usage, with a focus on convenience, consistency, and access to world-class virtual courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced OptiShot RSG Pro technology with precision analytics
Year-round access regardless of weather conditions
Complimentary golf clubs and amenities provided
Flexible membership plans for different usage levels

food_and_drink.notes: Complimentary snacks provided for all guests
No alcohol service mentioned on website

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium overhead golf simulator with advanced tracking and real-time shot data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary golf clubs are provided for all guests who come to play.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Complimentary snacks and water are provided, but no outside food or drinks are mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify an exact time for playing 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and suitable for juniors and youth golfers.
